---
title: "prod_nuc_analysis_AllParentals_20260414"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
setwd("/vf/users/kelpschdj/iNDI/Production/Nucleus_segmentation/analysis")
```

```{r}
#| include: false
#| label: Load packages

package_list <- c("tidyverse", "uwot", "ranger", "glue")
new_packages <- package_list[!(package_list %in% installed.packages()[,"Package"])]
if(length(new_packages)) install.packages(new_packages)
lapply(package_list, library, character.only = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#| label: Prepare data

samplesheet_auto_fn <- "/vf/users/CARDPB2/iNDI/Production/metadata/all_automated_plates_combined.csv"
samplesheet_auto <- read_csv(samplesheet_auto_fn) %>%
  mutate(
    well_row = match(str_extract(Well_ID, "^[A-Z]"), LETTERS),
    well_column = as.integer(str_extract(Well_ID, "\\d+")),
    experiment_design = "Automated"
  )

samplesheet_man_fn <- "/vf/users/CARDPB2/iNDI/Production/metadata/all_manual_plates_combined.csv"
samplesheet_man <- read_csv(samplesheet_man_fn) %>%
  mutate(
    well_row = match(str_extract(Well_ID, "^[A-Z]"), LETTERS),
    well_column = as.integer(str_extract(Well_ID, "\\d+")),
    experiment_design = "Manual"
  )

samplesheet <- bind_rows(samplesheet_auto, samplesheet_man)

plateID_to_folder_ID_fn <- "/vf/users/CARDPB2/iNDI/Production/metadata/indi_plateID_to_folderID.csv" 
plateID_to_folder_ID <- read_csv(plateID_to_folder_ID_fn) 
files <- list.files( path = "/vf/users/kelpschdj/iNDI/Production/Nucleus_segmentation/Nucleus_feature_data/", pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE ) 
```

```{r}
feature_cols <- c( "area", "mean_intensity", "std_intensity", "eccentricity", "solidity", "perimeter", "feret_diameter_max", "major_axis_length", "minor_axis_length" )
px_factor <- 0.09418670872212731
radius    <- 120
img_size  <- 2160
```

```{r}
flag_size <- function(plate, min_um2 = 20, max_um2 = 200) {
  plate %>%
    mutate(
      area_um2  = area * px_factor^2,
      fail_size = area_um2 <= min_um2 | area_um2 >= max_um2
    )
}

flag_edge <- function(plate, radius = 120, img_h = img_size, img_w = img_size) {
  plate %>%
    mutate(
      fail_edge = `centroid-0` - radius < 0  |
                  `centroid-0` + radius > img_h |
                  `centroid-1` - radius < 0  |
                  `centroid-1` + radius > img_w
    )
}

flag_overlap_img <- function(df, radius = 120, max_overlap_frac = 0.05) {
  circle_area <- pi * radius^2
  max_overlap <- max_overlap_frac * circle_area

  cx   <- df$`centroid-1`
  cy   <- df$`centroid-0`
  n    <- nrow(df)
  fail <- logical(n)

  for (i in seq_len(n)) {
    dx          <- cx - cx[i]
    dy          <- cy - cy[i]
    d           <- sqrt(dx^2 + dy^2)
    neighbours  <- which(d > 0 & d < 2 * radius)

    if (length(neighbours) == 0) next

    overlaps <- sapply(neighbours, function(j) {
      dij <- d[j]
      2 * radius^2 * acos(dij / (2 * radius)) - (dij / 2) * sqrt(4 * radius^2 - dij^2)
    })

    if (any(overlaps > max_overlap)) fail[i] <- TRUE
  }

  df$fail_overlap <- fail
  df
}

flag_intensity <- function(plate, max_intensity_cutoff = 500) {
  plate %>%
    mutate(fail_intensity = max_intensity <= max_intensity_cutoff)
}

flag_perimeter <- function(plate, max_perimeter = 1000) {
  plate %>%
    mutate(fail_perimeter = perimeter >= max_perimeter)
}

apply_filters <- function(plate) {
  plate <- flag_size(plate)
  plate <- flag_edge(plate)
  plate <- flag_intensity(plate)
  plate <- flag_perimeter(plate)
  plate <- plate %>%
    group_by(image_name) %>%
    group_modify(~ flag_overlap_img(.x, radius = radius)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(pass_qc = !fail_size & !fail_edge & !fail_intensity & !fail_perimeter & !fail_overlap)

  n_total <- nrow(plate)
  n_pass  <- sum(plate$pass_qc)

  message(glue(
    "  Filtering summary:\n",
    "    Total:          {n_total}\n",
    "    Fail size:      {sum(plate$fail_size)}\n",
    "    Fail edge:      {sum(plate$fail_edge)}\n",
    "    Fail intensity: {sum(plate$fail_intensity)}\n",
    "    Fail perimeter: {sum(plate$fail_perimeter)}\n",
    "    Fail overlap:   {sum(plate$fail_overlap)}\n",
    "    Pass QC:        {n_pass} ({round(n_pass / n_total * 100, 1)}%)"
  ))

  plate
}
```

```{r}
process_plate <- function(filename) {
  experiment_id <- str_extract(basename(filename), "^[^_]+")
  message("Processing: ", experiment_id)

  plate <- read_csv(filename, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(
      Folder_ID   = experiment_id,
      well_row    = as.integer(str_extract(image_name, "(?<=r)\\d+")),
      well_column = as.integer(str_extract(image_name, "(?<=c)\\d+"))
    ) %>%
    left_join(plateID_to_folder_ID, by = "Folder_ID") %>%
    left_join(samplesheet, by = c("well_row", "well_column", "iNDI_Plate_ID"))

  plate_ID <- unique(plate$iNDI_Plate_ID)[1]
  message("  → Plate ID: ", plate_ID)

  # Apply filters
  plate <- apply_filters(plate)
  
  plate %>% 
    filter(pass_qc) %>%
    filter(Genotype_Name == "Parental")
}
```

```{r}
safe_process <- purrr::possibly(process_plate, otherwise = NULL)
all_parentals <- purrr::map(files, safe_process, .progress = TRUE) %>%
  purrr::compact() %>%
  list_rbind()
```

```{r}
X <- all_parentals[, feature_cols]
plate_scaled <- scale(X)

cor_mat <- cor(plate_scaled, use = "complete.obs")

pca_result <- prcomp(plate_scaled, center = FALSE, scale. = FALSE)
X_pca <- pca_result$x[, 1:8]

pca_var <- pca_result$sdev^2
pct_var <- pca_var / sum(pca_var) * 100

# Scree plot
tibble(PC = 1:length(pct_var), var = pct_var) %>%
  ggplot(aes(PC, var)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(y = "% Variance Explained") +
  theme_minimal()

# PC1 vs PC2
pca_df <- as_tibble(pca_result$x) %>%
  bind_cols(all_parentals)

ggplot(pca_df, aes(PC1, PC2, color = iNDI_Plate_ID)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 0.5) +
  labs(
    x = glue("PC1 ({round(pct_var[1], 1)}%)"),
    y = glue("PC2 ({round(pct_var[2], 1)}%)")
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(pca_df, aes(PC1, PC2, color = Well_ID)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 0.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
  labs(
    x = glue("PC1 ({round(pct_var[1], 1)}%)"),
    y = glue("PC2 ({round(pct_var[2], 1)}%)")
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(pca_df, aes(PC1, PC2, color = experiment_design)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 0.5) +
  labs(
    x = glue("PC1 ({round(pct_var[1], 1)}%)"),
    y = glue("PC2 ({round(pct_var[2], 1)}%)")
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

umap_res <- umap(X_pca, n_neighbors = 15, min_dist = 0.1)

all_parentals$UMAP1 <- umap_res[,1]
all_parentals$UMAP2 <- umap_res[,2]

ggplot(all_parentals, aes(UMAP1, UMAP2, color = iNDI_Plate_ID)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(all_parentals, aes(UMAP1, UMAP2, color = Well_ID)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 0.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(all_parentals, aes(UMAP1, UMAP2, color = experiment_design)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal()

#subsample umap
set.seed(1)

plate_sub <- all_parentals %>%
  select(-c("UMAP1", "UMAP2")) %>%
  group_by(iNDI_Plate_ID) %>%
  slice_sample(n = 500) %>%
  ungroup()

X <- plate_sub[, feature_cols]
plate_scaled <- scale(X)

cor_mat <- cor(plate_scaled, use = "complete.obs")

pca_result <- prcomp(plate_scaled, center = FALSE, scale. = FALSE)
X_pca <- pca_result$x[, 1:8]

umap_res <- umap(X_pca, n_neighbors = 15, min_dist = 0.1)

plate_sub$UMAP1 <- umap_res[,1]
plate_sub$UMAP2 <- umap_res[,2]

ggplot(plate_sub, aes(UMAP1, UMAP2, color = iNDI_Plate_ID)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(plate_sub, aes(UMAP1, UMAP2, color = Well_ID)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 0.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(plate_sub, aes(UMAP1, UMAP2, color = experiment_design)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
df_well <- all_parentals %>%
  group_by(Well_ID, iNDI_Plate_ID, Batch_Info, experiment_design) %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(feature_cols), mean), .groups = "drop") 

y_lim <- df_well %>% 
  #filter(Outlier == "Normal") %>%
  pull(area) %>% 
  max(., na.rm = TRUE) %>% 
  plyr::round_any(., 5000, ceiling)

ggplot(df_well, 
       aes(x = iNDI_Plate_ID, 
           y = area)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "skyblue",
              alpha = 0.7,
              scale = "width") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5,
               outlier.shape = NA,
               alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1) +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::comma, limits = c(0,y_lim), #c(lower limit, upper limit)
    breaks = seq(0,y_lim,y_lim/5)) +  #seq(lower limit, upper limit, tick frequency)
  labs(x = "Genotype",
       y = "Nucleus area (pixels; well averaged)") +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = 'bold', angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = 'bold'), 
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    legend.title = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    legend.text = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    strip.text.x = element_text(face = 'bold')) 

y_lim <- df_well %>% 
  #filter(Outlier == "Normal") %>%
  pull(mean_intensity) %>% 
  max(., na.rm = TRUE) %>% 
  plyr::round_any(., 5000, ceiling)

ggplot(df_well, 
       aes(x = iNDI_Plate_ID, 
           y = mean_intensity)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "skyblue",
              alpha = 0.7,
              scale = "width") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5,
               outlier.shape = NA,
               alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1) +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::comma, limits = c(0,y_lim), #c(lower limit, upper limit)
    breaks = seq(0,y_lim,y_lim/5)) +  #seq(lower limit, upper limit, tick frequency)
  labs(x = "Genotype",
       y = "Mean Intensity (Well averaged)") +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = 'bold', angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = 'bold'), 
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    legend.title = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    legend.text = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    strip.text.x = element_text(face = 'bold')) 

y_lim <- df_well %>% 
  #filter(Outlier == "Normal") %>%
  pull(std_intensity) %>% 
  max(., na.rm = TRUE) %>% 
  plyr::round_any(., 5000, ceiling)

ggplot(df_well, 
       aes(x = iNDI_Plate_ID, 
           y = std_intensity)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "skyblue",
              alpha = 0.7,
              scale = "width") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5,
               outlier.shape = NA,
               alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1) +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::comma, limits = c(0,y_lim), #c(lower limit, upper limit)
    breaks = seq(0,y_lim,y_lim/5)) +  #seq(lower limit, upper limit, tick frequency)
  labs(x = "Genotype",
       y = "Standard Deviation of Intensity (Well averaged)") +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = 'bold', angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = 'bold'), 
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    legend.title = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    legend.text = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    strip.text.x = element_text(face = 'bold')) 

y_lim <- df_well %>% 
  #filter(Outlier == "Normal") %>%
  pull(eccentricity) %>% 
  max(., na.rm = TRUE) %>% 
  plyr::round_any(., 1, ceiling)

ggplot(df_well, 
       aes(x = iNDI_Plate_ID, 
           y = eccentricity)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "skyblue",
              alpha = 0.7,
              scale = "width") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5,
               outlier.shape = NA,
               alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1) +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::comma, limits = c(0,y_lim), #c(lower limit, upper limit)
    breaks = seq(0,y_lim,y_lim/5)) +  #seq(lower limit, upper limit, tick frequency)
  labs(x = "Genotype",
       y = "Eccentricity(Well averaged)") +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = 'bold', angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = 'bold'), 
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    legend.title = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    legend.text = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    strip.text.x = element_text(face = 'bold'))

y_lim <- df_well %>% 
  #filter(Outlier == "Normal") %>%
  pull(solidity) %>% 
  max(., na.rm = TRUE) %>% 
  plyr::round_any(., 1, ceiling)

ggplot(df_well, 
       aes(x = iNDI_Plate_ID, 
           y = solidity)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "skyblue",
              alpha = 0.7,
              scale = "width") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5,
               outlier.shape = NA,
               alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1) +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::comma, limits = c(0,y_lim), #c(lower limit, upper limit)
    breaks = seq(0,y_lim,y_lim/5)) +  #seq(lower limit, upper limit, tick frequency)
  labs(x = "Genotype",
       y = "Solidity (Well averaged)") +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = 'bold', angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = 'bold'), 
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    legend.title = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    legend.text = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    strip.text.x = element_text(face = 'bold')) 

y_lim <- df_well %>% 
  #filter(Outlier == "Normal") %>%
  pull(perimeter) %>% 
  max(., na.rm = TRUE) %>% 
  plyr::round_any(., 100, ceiling)

ggplot(df_well, 
       aes(x = iNDI_Plate_ID, 
           y = perimeter)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "skyblue",
              alpha = 0.7,
              scale = "width") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5,
               outlier.shape = NA,
               alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1) +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::comma, limits = c(0,y_lim), #c(lower limit, upper limit)
    breaks = seq(0,y_lim,y_lim/5)) +  #seq(lower limit, upper limit, tick frequency)
  labs(x = "Genotype",
       y = "Perimeter (Pixels; well averaged)") +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = 'bold', angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = 'bold'), 
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    legend.title = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    legend.text = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    strip.text.x = element_text(face = 'bold')) 

y_lim <- df_well %>% 
  #filter(Outlier == "Normal") %>%
  pull(feret_diameter_max) %>% 
  max(., na.rm = TRUE) %>% 
  plyr::round_any(., 20, ceiling)

ggplot(df_well, 
       aes(x = iNDI_Plate_ID, 
           y = feret_diameter_max)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "skyblue",
              alpha = 0.7,
              scale = "width") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5,
               outlier.shape = NA,
               alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1) +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::comma, limits = c(0,y_lim), #c(lower limit, upper limit)
    breaks = seq(0,y_lim,y_lim/5)) +  #seq(lower limit, upper limit, tick frequency)
  labs(x = "Genotype",
       y = "feret diameter max (Well averaged)") +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = 'bold', angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = 'bold'), 
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    legend.title = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    legend.text = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    strip.text.x = element_text(face = 'bold')) 

y_lim <- df_well %>% 
  #filter(Outlier == "Normal") %>%
  pull(major_axis_length) %>% 
  max(., na.rm = TRUE) %>% 
  plyr::round_any(., 20, ceiling)

ggplot(df_well, 
       aes(x = iNDI_Plate_ID, 
           y = major_axis_length)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "skyblue",
              alpha = 0.7,
              scale = "width") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5,
               outlier.shape = NA,
               alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1) +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::comma, limits = c(0,y_lim), #c(lower limit, upper limit)
    breaks = seq(0,y_lim,y_lim/5)) +  #seq(lower limit, upper limit, tick frequency)
  labs(x = "Genotype",
       y = "Major axis length (Pixels; well averaged)") +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = 'bold', angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = 'bold'), 
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    legend.title = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    legend.text = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    strip.text.x = element_text(face = 'bold')) 

y_lim <- df_well %>% 
  #filter(Outlier == "Normal") %>%
  pull(minor_axis_length) %>% 
  max(., na.rm = TRUE) %>% 
  plyr::round_any(., 20, ceiling)

ggplot(df_well, 
       aes(x = iNDI_Plate_ID, 
           y = minor_axis_length)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "skyblue",
              alpha = 0.7,
              scale = "width") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5,
               outlier.shape = NA,
               alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1) +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::comma, limits = c(0,y_lim), #c(lower limit, upper limit)
    breaks = seq(0,y_lim,y_lim/5)) +  #seq(lower limit, upper limit, tick frequency)
  labs(x = "Genotype",
       y = "Minor axis length (Pixels; well averaged)") +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = 'bold', angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = 'bold'), 
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    legend.title = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    legend.text = element_text(face = 'bold'),
    strip.text.x = element_text(face = 'bold')) 
```
